kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update KDE Frameworks to 5.85.

The patch is attachend, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Framework-to-5.85.patch


mfg Tobias
